name: docs-browser-extension
description: Serve generated docs in a real-DOM webview pane, with a co-located Playwright engine and a hosted MCP server for AI-driven doc development & testing.

viewsWelcome.contents:
No documentation found yet.

Point the extension at your generated HTML docs by setting the docs directory, then open the browser.
[Set docs directory](command:docsBrowser.openSettings)
[Open Docs Browser](command:docsBrowser.open)

To let Claude Code drive the docs, add the MCP config to this workspace:
[Create .mcp.json](command:docsBrowser.createMcpConfig)

docsBrowser.docsDir.description: Directory (relative to the workspace, or absolute) of generated HTML docs to serve.

docsBrowser.mcpPort.description: Fixed port for the hosted MCP HTTP server (referenced by .mcp.json). On conflict the extension fails loudly rather than picking another port.

docsBrowser.maxCrawlPages.description: Maximum pages the check_links crawler visits before stopping. Raise this for large generated doc sets; check_links warns when the cap is hit. Applied at activation (reload to change).
